frame_analyses.description: Black frame, no visible instruments or activity
Right grasper holding gauze, left instrument approaching circle. Blue gauze suspended between clamps with black circular marking clearly visible
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good initial gauze stabilization, circle appears to be standard 4cm diameter

frame_analyses.description: Both instruments engaged with gauze, left scissors making initial entry cut at approximately 6 o'clock position of circle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Entry appears close to marked line, steady positioning

frame_analyses.description: Scissors progressing clockwise around circle, currently at approximately 4 o'clock position. Right grasper providing counter-tension
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth cutting motion, good instrument coordination

frame_analyses.description: Cutting continues around circle, now at approximately 2 o'clock position. Cut edge appears to follow marked line closely
Cutting progressing past 12 o'clock position, approaching 10 o'clock. Gauze remains securely attached to clamps
Cut approaching 8-9 o'clock position, nearly three-quarters complete around circle
Final cutting at 6 o'clock position, approaching closure of circular cut. Center gauze piece appears ready to separate
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean completion of cut, circle fully excised

penalties.description: Minor deviation at 3 o'clock position, approximately 1mm outside marked line
Slight deviation at 9 o'clock position, approximately 1mm outside marked line

confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of cutting progression and completion. Some uncertainty in precise deviation measurements due to camera angle and lighting, but major violations clearly absent. Gauze attachment and completion status well-documented.
cannot_determine: Exact deviation measurements at 1:30, 4:30, 7:30, and 10:30 positions - camera angle provides limited precision for intermediate cardinal points
technique_summary: Solid intermediate performance with efficient cutting technique and good instrument coordination. Time of 84 seconds falls within intermediate range. Minor precision deviations noted but overall clean execution.
improvement_suggestions: Focus on maintaining closer adherence to marked line, particularly at 3 and 9 o'clock positions
Consider slightly slower cutting at critical positions to improve precision
